Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_c57bc59338a6462faabc36e9b846ed02_fpdko8ch\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, UserMixin, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from datetime import datetime
6	
7	app = Flask(__name__)
8	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'your-secret-key'
9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///tasks.db'
10	db = SQLAlchemy(app)
11	
12	login_manager = LoginManager()
13	login_manager.init_app(app)
14	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
15	
16	class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
17	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
18	    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
19	    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
20	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
21	
22	class Task(db.Model):
23	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
24	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
25	    priority = db.Column(db.String(50), default='Medium')
26	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
27	    done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
28	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
29	
30	@login_manager.user_loader
31	def load_user(user_id):
32	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
33	
34	with app.app_context():
35	    db.create_all()
36	
37	if __name__ == '__main__':
38	    app.run(debug=True)
